title: Surgeon Vacancy at B.Braun India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at B.Braun India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
B.Braun India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About B.Braun India:
B.Braun India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with B.Braun India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
